title: Dungeon Encounters – General
description: A broad table of non-combat and combat situations encountered in dungeons, ruins, and labyrinthine structures in a fantasy setting.

entries.result: The flooded chamber contains an old diary; a whisper speaks a familiar name.
A leather door opens into crypt alcove, where a dry fountain waits in eerie silence.
In the subterranean garden, a single heartbeat echoes from behind a singing statue; the torchlight turns blue.
A corridor slopes into ritual room; the floor is covered with charcoal sketches, and the stones shift underfoot.
The party finds an old diary beside a stone pillar; a ticking mechanism grows louder when anyone approaches.
The statue chamber contains a dry fountain; an unseen creature breathes nearby.
A obsidian door opens into well room, where a singing statue waits in eerie silence.
In the dusty library, a deep sigh echoes from behind a pile of broken weapons; a hidden mechanism clicks softly.
A corridor slopes into guardroom; the floor is covered with dry petals, and the exit is harder to find than the entrance.
The party finds a dry fountain beside a ash wood pillar; rustling paper grows louder when anyone approaches.
The armory contains a singing statue; the ceiling sheds dust.
A clay door opens into narrow cell, where a pile of broken weapons waits in eerie silence.
In the bone chapel, distant laughter echoes from behind an old diary; a shadow moves without a source.
A corridor slopes into underground bridge; the floor is covered with torn banners, and the walls hum with pressure.
The party finds a singing statue beside a wax pillar; someone counting grows louder when anyone approaches.
The mosaic gallery contains a pile of broken weapons; the door closes by itself.
A bone door opens into empty barracks, where an old diary waits in eerie silence.
In the mirror hall, muffled bells echoes from behind a dry fountain; the air suddenly turns cold.
A corridor slopes into clockwork room; the floor is covered with broken pottery, and a trap has already been triggered.
The party finds a pile of broken weapons beside a brass pillar; a child humming grows louder when anyone approaches.
The flooded chamber contains an old diary; a whisper speaks a familiar name. Locals remember this as the Crooked Bell sign.
